    Kalman filter for state estimation in linear dynamic systems.

    kDayAfter(int) - Method in class org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
    Adjusts this date to the first occurrence of the specified weekday after the current date.
    kDayBefore(int) - Method in class org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
    Adjusts this date to the last occurrence of the specified weekday before the current date.
    kDayNearest(int) - Method in class org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
    Adjusts this date to the specified weekday nearest to the current date.
    kDayOnOrAfter(int) - Method in class org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
    Adjusts this date to the specified weekday on or after the current date.
    kDayOnOrBefore(int) - Method in class org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
    Adjusts this date to the specified weekday on or before the current date.

    Connection keep-alive duration.
    kellyBetFraction(double, double) - Static method in class org.episteme.social.sports.BettingOddsCalculator
    Calculates the Kelly Criterion fraction for optimal bet sizing. f* = (bp - q) / b where b = net odds (odds - 1), p = prob of winning, q = prob of losing.
